note: UPDATED MINERS card: adoption target raised from 3 to 10 distinct post-fork miners. Pulse continues red while count < 10. New sub-line states walk the operator through progress: 'no updated miners' (0) / 'centralised' (1) / 'thin' (2) / 'growing — N to target' (3-5) / 'near target (10) — N to go' (6-9) / 'healthy' (10+). Tooltip now carries the explicit disclaimer: 'Counts distinct addresses that have produced an accepted Phase II block in the last 1000 blocks. Lower bound on adoption — miners that fail to produce valid blocks are not counted.'
